## Summary / 改动内容

<!-- Briefly describe this change. / 简要说明本次改动。 -->

## Problem addressed / 要解决的问题

<!-- Link an issue or explain why this change is needed. / 关联 Issue，或说明为什么需要这项改动。 -->

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] This change relates directly to the first-phase initiative, protocol, or community process. / 改动与第一阶段的倡议、协议或社区流程直接相关。
- [ ] I have distinguished facts, inferences, value judgments, and satire. / 我已区分事实、推断、价值判断和讽刺表达。
- [ ] The content contains no personal information, credentials, private conversations, or non-public material. / 内容不包含个人信息、凭据、私密对话或未公开材料。
- [ ] If this changes a protocol obligation, I have explained examples and likely effects. / 如果改变协议义务，我已说明适用示例与影响。
